name: CLOACAL EXSTROPHY
definition: exstrophy of all structures forming cloaca (rectum, bladder, lower GU tract) similar to
distribution: omphalocele (initial observation) as craniad part of large complex anterior wall defect
discriminating_features: omphalocele (initial observation) as craniad part of large complex anterior wall defect
"elephant trunk" = bowel herniation between everted bladder halves
